action_boundary: May IAM approve AP-INVOICE-ENTRY access request AR-201 for user U-14?
communication_boundary: Decide only from source-control records. Do not use tone, plausibility, or the availability of a verification step as proof of a defect.

documents.text: Access request AR-201 asks to add role AP-INVOICE-ENTRY for user U-14.
Entitlement extract ENT-HELDV5-012 shows user U-14 currently holds AP-PAYMENT-RELEASE.
SoD matrix SOD-HELDV5-012 prohibits the pair AP-INVOICE-ENTRY plus AP-PAYMENT-RELEASE; AP-REPORT-VIEW is unconstrained with AP-INVOICE-ENTRY.
Manager approval MGR-HELDV5-012 approves AR-201 for user U-14.
Access may be approved only when the requested role, the user's existing roles, and the segregation-of-duties matrix do not create a prohibited role pair.

domain: Atlas held V5 exploratory action-boundary controls
